text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Hey Trainer, come here for a sec. ♪
choice_data_list: What's this all of a sudden?
What's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Interested in what I have to say? Hehe, of
course you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, right when I was passing by the student
council office...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Teio's been doing some noteworthy work
recently, hasn't she?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I can sense that she's identified her strengths,
studied them, and used that to polish her running
form.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What's this? You, handing out compliments? Her
work must be truly noteworthy then.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Even I can say something nice from time
to time.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...And that's what I heard them say! Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I task you with further increasing my many
strengths! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. If anyone can get the job done, it'll be you!
Am I wrong?
